About Us

Nurturing Knowledge & Character

KHIDMATHUSSUNNA DARS is an Islamic educational institution dedicated to spreading authentic knowledge and values of Islam. We aim to nurture a generation with strong iman, good character and useful knowledge to serve the society.

Our institution provides a comprehensive curriculum rooted in the Quran and Sunnah, guiding students toward excellence in both religious and worldly affairs.

📚

Library

A rich collection of Islamic and academic books for students to explore and learn.

💻

Digital Classes

Modern digital learning tools and online sessions to enhance student knowledge.

〰️ 30+ Years Glorious years of service
◻️ 200+ Students Taught over the years
